task.en: Two-step task: (1) In Calendar, create a new event titled exactly `Standup` on 2026-06-01 from 10:00 AM to 10:30 AM in any calendar. (2) Then switch to Mail and create a new draft message (do NOT send) with the subject `Standup`. Close the draft so it is saved to Drafts.

pre_command: osascript -e 'tell application "Calendar" to quit' 2>/dev/null; osascript -e 'tell application "Mail" to quit' 2>/dev/null; sleep 1
grading_command: CAL=$(osascript -e 'tell application "Calendar" to get start date of (first event whose summary is "Standup")' 2>/dev/null); MAIL=$(osascript -e 'tell application "Mail" to get subject of every message of (first mailbox whose name contains "Draft")' 2>/dev/null); echo "$CAL" | grep -q "June 1, 2026" && echo "$CAL" | grep -q "10:00:00 AM" && echo "$MAIL" | grep -q "Standup" && echo True || echo False
